problem_statement: Freelancers lose hours every week manually tracking invoices in spreadsheets, chasing late payments, and sending follow-ups by hand
target_user: Freelance designers and developers aged 25–40 who work remotely and manage 3–10 active clients at a time
success_definition: 100 active users, average 3 invoices sent per user per week, < 5% support tickets related to invoicing

epics.name: User Authentication
epics.business_value: Without an identity layer, users cannot have personal data — every invoice, client, and payment record must be tied to a verified account.

stories.text: As a new user, I want to register with my email and password, so that I can create a personal account.

acceptance_criteria.given: I am on the registration page
acceptance_criteria.when: I fill in a valid email and a password of 8+ characters and click Create Account
acceptance_criteria.then: my account is created, I am logged in, and I am redirected to the dashboard

acceptance_criteria.given: I enter an email that is already registered
acceptance_criteria.then: I see the error This email is already in use. Try logging in. and the form is not submitted

acceptance_criteria.given: I enter a password fewer than 8 characters
acceptance_criteria.then: I see the inline error Password must be at least 8 characters and the form is not submitted

stories.text: As a returning user, I want to log in with my email and password, so that I can access my invoices and client data.

acceptance_criteria.given: I am on the login page
acceptance_criteria.when: I enter a valid email and password and click Log In
acceptance_criteria.then: I am authenticated and redirected to my dashboard
I see the error Incorrect email or password. and I am not logged in

epics.name: Invoice Management
epics.business_value: Invoicing is the core function of the app. Without it, there is no product.

stories.text: As a freelancer, I want to create a new invoice with line items, so that I can bill my clients professionally.

acceptance_criteria.given: I am on the invoice creation page
acceptance_criteria.when: I fill in client name, line items and click Save Invoice
acceptance_criteria.then: the invoice is saved with a unique auto-generated invoice number and a Draft status
the subtotal and invoice total are calculated automatically
